## Detection claim

Describe the observable behavior, logsource, grouping/window semantics, and ATT&CK mapping.

## Evidence

- [ ] Malicious events identify expected rule IDs.
- [ ] Adjacent benign events exercise likely false positives.
- [ ] Precision, recall, F1, alert count, and technique gates pass.
- [ ] Replay ordering and boundary timing are tested.
- [ ] Data is entirely synthetic/public-safe.
- [ ] Strict typing, lint, coverage, validation, scenario tests, and build pass.
